chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4111 / 2014 (Export Processing Zone Authority V. Province of Sindh & Others) ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 20484/2014. 3) For hearing of main case. 20.11.2025. Mr. Muhammad Azhar Mahar, Manager (Legal), Export Processing Zone, Authority (Petitioner). ___________________ The instant Petition impugned Judgment and Decree dated 21.08.2008 and 27.08.2008 in addition to order dated 05.01.2013 passed by Ist Senior Civil Judge, Malir at Karachi. It apparent from the bare perusal of the Memo of Petition and the accompanying annexures that no Appeal has mandated under the Civil Procedure Code, 1908 preferred by the Petitioner. The instant Petition in this regard is misconceived and is dismissed along with all pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
